reviewTitle: I recently applied for a mortgage…
reviewDescription:
I recently applied for a mortgage refinance with Better Mortgage and was initially quoted a fixed rate of 3.99% with an APR around 4.2–4.3%. At closing, however, the numbers did not match what I had been told earlier, and I was asked to bring additional money to closing to buy down the rate, which had not been clearly explained up front.
Throughout the process I felt the communication was confusing and sometimes misleading. Important details about points, cash to close, and how the interest rate was being calculated were either not disclosed clearly or kept changing at the last minute. This made me feel that the offer was not transparent and that I could not fully trust the information I was given.
Because of these issues, I decided not to proceed and I would caution others to be very careful, double‑check all documents, and confirm every number in writing before committing. In my personal opinion, the way the loan terms were presented felt dishonest, and I would not recommend this lender to others.

Fraudulent better mortgage  Origination Charges is $10,688

reviewDescription:

I am self-employed and don't have a traditional 8-5 job, but I have multiple income streams and a CPA who is great at using depreciation to save me on taxes. My tax returns should tell the story Better is looking to see (they've been more than enough to secure loans in the past). Better  kept asking for more and more documents (some of them more than once, like somehow they forgot). 
The appraiser they hired also valued my property at $125,000 less than I bought it for and they ignored my dispute, even though I had reason to do so. 

They then discontinued the application without letting me know. The only reason I found out is because I reached out to them to find out what the heck was happening. 

All that said, avoid these folks if you don't have an 8-5. I certainly won't be using them again.

reviewTitle: Can't draw on the HELOC after transfer to Shellpoint
reviewDescription: The loan funding process was very efficient and the team that help through the closing was great. The loan is being serviced by Shellpoint. It's a HELOC but Shellpoint doesn't have my loan configured to take draws against the product after 3 months of holding the loan product. I'd never get this HELOC product again because it doesn't seem to be a HELOC if you can't draw on it.

If you have anything about your mortgage or refinance that is slightly out of the ordinary -- I strongly advise choosing a local lender - as they just don't have the expertise to address slightly more complex issues.

The mostly have junior staff and overseas support staff -- who either don't respond or make errors in the evaluation of your underwriting.   The whole process drags on and on and you are left in limbo.   Requests to speak to supervisors and others with experience go unaddressed.

My housing association has a lawsuit again it that is in the process of being resolved -- with a settlement in the near future.   

I thankfully made the decision to go to a local lender when I sensed things were stalling and I could absolutely no support.   The local lender was able to move forward and fund the loan.   If I would have waited -- my mortgage would have been refused and I would have lost the property.

Unfortunately, I didn't learn my lesson -- and tried to use better for refinance.   Same outcome - a refusal after months of questions, follow-up, odd questions.
reviewCompanyResponse: Hi Nick, thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We’re sorry to hear how frustrating this process felt. If you're open to sharing more, please email me directly at experience@better.com. -Katie at Better

reviewTitle: Scammy outfits like yours disgrace the…
reviewDescription: Scammy outfits like yours disgrace the entire financial industry. You throw around your so-called “pre-approvals” like cheap bait, then wreck people’s credit scores with your idiotic inquiries. You don’t give a damn about customers — all you care about is luring them in and leaving them with ruined credit. No integrity, no professionalism — just greed and deception. You belong in the trash, not in lending.

I was looking for information on mortgages with Better last year but wasn’t ready to buy. They collected my contact information and have proceeded to contact me relentlessly about buying a home over the past 12 months. I have asked to be removed from their contact list 5 - 6 times. I had a phone call this morning, I asked again to be removed and then received another text this evening.

Do yourself a favor: avoid this company. You have many other choices for lending as a consumer in the US. I have never experienced such awful communication and transparency of the mortgage lending process as I did with Better. This was especially egregious when my most important asset was on the line and was treated like it was practically nothing. My closing date was pushed back 4 days even after my real estate agent and I made it clear over a month prior that we needed to close on a specific date. This meant I had to navigate being functionally homeless during that time, which was both costly and pretty scary. My loan coordinator seemed more interested in dismissing and burying the issue around closing on the new property than offering agreeable concessions for a massive (and completely preventable) oversight with the closing disclosure. There was absolutely zero transparency about how appraisal waivers work, which almost cost me the deal on the new house. I chose Better for its advertised ease of use around the online portal, but this feature did not at all offset the stress and frustration I experienced working with this company. If someone from Better reads this, understand that an online portal for uploading mandatory documents to secure a mortgage is not a replacement for good customer service and *actual* communication from industry experts. I am disgusted by how my situation was handled.
Great andknowledgeable staff that was very responsive. Easy to work with

reviewTitle: Never get a HELOC with them!!
reviewDescription:
I got a HELOC through Better in August 2024. It wasn't a wonderful rate but overall the actual process of getting the HELOC was not terrible. When I asked about 'draws' and how that would work, they cheerfully said 'oh we'll send you checks and it's really easy' (after the 90 day lockout period).
   But here is the basic problem with Better.. Once you close, you don't mean anything to them and they almost immediately will transfer you to a servicer like Shellpoint.. who to put it mildly are a nightmare. To give you an idea.. Shellpoint don't even mention HELOCS on their servicing app, let alone give you information on ordering checks etc. This is something you 100% have to drive with them and it is an absolute horrible nightmare. For example, if they state they will send them, you don't get any any way to track the request, record the request, expedite the request and timeline? "30 days or more"  and there is nothing you can do if the request goes nowhere..  If there is one piece of advice I would beg folks out there to listen to is to avoid getting a HELOC from anyone that either doesn't service it on the backend or basically doesn't care about you after closing. There are for sure 'Better' options than better and your first stop should be to a credit union.. In our family, we will never use Better for any product again! We have learned our lesson.

N.B There should be a reply option here. But an empty corporate response like this one is frankly part of the problem. It's disingenuous because I have already 'discussed my experience' - you can read it right here. I'm not naive.. it's business and your business is all about selling on the frontend.. you can always do the stock 'Golly, we're sorry things didn't go well for you..' to try and damage control, and then move on as in this case. But.. If you genuinely cared on the other hand, there are many things you could do e.g 'We will review the provider and commit to no longer working with them if data supports the assertions.. ' and/or 'We'll work with our servicers and make sure that all servicers clearly offer details on accessing the HELOC and processing draws.. we will define some minimum standards such as x and servicers that don't meet those standards will not be people we work with.. etc etc'. See the difference.. the latter is the type of quite reasonable response that a business that truly cares about the post-sales experience would issue.. very different to the empty corporate response here. If you want to be 'Better' then mean it.. show it. Just once.. go beyond the empty contrived and frankly meaningless responses and let people know what you did specifically to try and improve this in the future. That will actually end up winning you customers.. Try it..
reviewCompanyResponse: Hi Lauren, I’m sorry to hear you were unhappy with the process at Better. We strive to make the mortgage process easy for everyone and value our customers’ feedback to improve the Better experience. If you’d like to further discuss your experience, feel free to contact us at experience@better.com. -Katie at Better

Most of the time, if not every time, if they didn’t answer on first call they called back within 15-30 minutes. Just great customer service. The process from start to finish was smooth. The day I "locked" I was very clear that we were purchasing a condo - my loan consultant hadn't realized this and said that may change the rate. He put it into the system then came back with good news - the rate actually went down! Unfortunately, this was too good to be true - two weeks later my rate suddenly adjusted up so I would owe $4000 more at closing because they hadn't realized it was a condo, even though I had a very clear conversation saying it was and was given that rate with that understanding from my loan consultant. He apologized for the error, but said there was absolutely nothing he could do, even though this was their mistake. So now, due to an error Better made, I owe either $4000 more at closing or $150 more per month that I was "rate locked" at, and I no longer can shop with other lenders as I am too close to closing.

This company is incredibly disappointing.

Following my financial advisor’s recommendation, I applied for a $150K HELOC. As a stay-at-home father (my wife passed away), I rely on life insurance proceeds for income. I explained my situation to their advisor, provided all the necessary information, and was told we could proceed.

The next day, a sales manager named Daniel called, rudely questioning why I wasn’t moving the loan along. I had completed every step as outlined on their portal, but they rejected some documents. When I spoke with Helen, a loan coordinator, she said I uploaded the wrong files. I pointed out that I followed their website’s instructions and explained that some documents kept disappearing from the portal. She didn’t seem to care about the technical issues I was facing. After re-uploading everything, I received confirmation that the title search and credit check were moving forward.

Then, despite having completed all tasks, I got an email saying they wouldn’t approve the $150K line because my son’s SSA benefits only last for three years. I had already provided proof of my financials, showing I had four times the line amount in one account, a near-800 credit score, and only $30K left on my mortgage. I even suggested reducing the line to align with my monthly draw amounts.

Instead, they came back offering just $50K. They had all the necessary information from the start to make this decision.

In my opinion, they’re neither upfront nor knowledgeable, and I wouldn’t trust them. It feels like a bait-and-switch: promise $150K, then offer only $50K.

I pulled my application and would recommend others look elsewhere. I’m more frustrated by the time I wasted with them.

Brieauna Williams my coordinator was a pleasure to work with, she made it all so simple, every time that I needed to talk to her she answered my phone calls. She kept me well informed throughout the process and let me know what to expect next. I have to honestly say that working with this team and with Better Mortage I would definitely recommend them to my friends and family and to whoever needs refinancing or home loans. This was my second loan on my home. I was amazed at how fast and smooth everything went. Thank you all , you’re the best.

reviewTitle: Great lending staff Myra and Kamaria
reviewDescription: Great lending staff Myra and Kamaria - very detailed and had lots of patience to answer my questions.

easy process, friendly and helpful.underwriters grouped questions and required docs for the most part, not many surprises

reviewTitle: Julie and Kody walked me through…
reviewDescription: Julie and Kody walked me through something I was very unfamiliar with, and because of their patience and diligence, I’m able to do what I’ve always wanted to.. start a company. reviewTitle: Best I worked with and here is why
reviewDescription: Better is super upfront with all cost, no sales man tactics which most lenders use. All done online. Always answered all my questions. V easy to work with and no loan fees. Highly recommend

reviewDescription: This was a very good experience. My wife and I have complex finances (a mix of W2, 1099, S Corp, and K-1). reviewTitle: Talked to these people about a HELOC
reviewDescription: Talked to these people about a HELOC. Going along OK until I discovered their fees are off the charts high. HELOCS dont require all the fees they want. Go to a credit union.

reviewTitle: The process was long and arduous
reviewDescription: The process was long and arduous. I was passed between people and it seemed like they were not really interested in my loan. I was looking for a HELOC that was 76% LTV and it took forever! The worst part is that they ask for all of the account numbers and verify all of your outstanding creditors prior to closing and then give you checks that you have to mail to them! They even state it could take 40 days for the checks to process. This is the worst experience I have ever had with a lending company!!!

reviewTitle: Great customer service at all levels
reviewDescription: Great customer service at all levels. They were on top of everything and frequent contact by phone ensured everything was taken care of with minimal hassle. Best mortgage experience

We did a HELOC to take care of some additions we wanted to make to our new house.  The process was super efficient and they were transparent in their visibility into current status, next steps, and any additional info they needed.  The entire thing took a couple of days to get approved (and I found them on a Friday), about a week to get the appraisal, and then we closed early the next week.  The HELOC is a great product and gives us the flexibility to use only what we need and keep it open for future projects.  You don’t run into lending products like theirs very often.  Great company!

reviewTitle: Excellent technology driven swift and detailed processing
reviewDescription: Excellent technology driven swift and detailed processing by the lender with competitive rates.

Julia Lux is the best!  She is most professional and made the experience as her communication Skills are superb!

The California crew, however, not so much.

Fantastic website, easy-to-contact live people, everything spelled out in black-and-white, reasonable refinance costs, lightning-fast turnaround. I've been through at least a dozen different mortgage processes, and this was hands-down the best.

reviewTitle: The entire process was extremely easy
reviewDescription: The entire process was extremely easy. From your smart phone you are able to complete tasks in order to upload everything necessary and complete all forms and signatures. Super friendly! Everyone made the HELOC process a breath of fresh air!

She was always available to answer my questions and made a genuine effort to take care of all my needs throughout the process. Her dedication and expertise made a significant difference, and I highly recommend her to anyone in need of mortgage assistance.

reviewTitle: Better helped me getting better rate…
reviewDescription: Better helped me getting better rate than computers and closing on time. Fully online service and no hassle process. Thank you.

The rates at better were excellent and the lack of origination fees was a no brainer. We had a terrific experience and closed in 3 weeks! I enjoyed using the tech forward website which kept documents and tasks very organized. I would absolutely use better again

Pros: The task system is very straightforward and easy to follow. The upfront communication is very good.

Cons: When questions arise, getting answers -- or even a response at all -- is very difficult. It took repeated follow-ups to get anything back from the Better team, and then there were two different instances where I was given incorrect information -- essentially baited and switched. In the end, the rate was still good enough to make it "worth it" ... but barely so.

reviewTitle: where are you loan officer...went awol or something?
reviewDescription: While initially there were a lot of phone calls from this company to secure our loan and get us as customers...once our rate locked no phone call, no call backs....the loan officer who called me 3 times a day is gone...she never answers the phone or calls back even after scheduling a call with her though their website. So only respite is to call their customer service directly everytime

reviewTitle: I have refinance twice with better and…
reviewDescription: I have refinance twice with better and it’s been a 10/10 both times. Wonderful company with great rates.

We decided to give Better.com a chance after a brief web search as we needed to secure a lender (aggregator) that could work efficiently for us as our home buying plans would almost certainly be done while on a 5,000 mile journey. We began my placing a call and explaining our situation and needs. In less than 15 minutes, we had established an account and were able to generate the much needed “Loan Approval Letter” that would spearhead our efforts to secure and close on a home. That was mid May. After unsuccessfully bidding on one particular home, we found another better home on June 17. This was the day we reached back out to our loan manager to alert him that a contract may be imminent. Today is July 22 AND WE JUST CLOSED!!! To our delight, this entire process, including ordering and executing the appraisal and home inspection as well as processing all the paperwork required by underwriting, took basically ONE MONTH!!! This is unheard of speed and efficiency. We have nothing but the highest of praise for Justin No and Izaak Kasimov for their roles in making this happen. The entire experience exuded professionalism and military precision and efficiency. Fans for life!

Robert L. ( Loan Officer) and Brieauna W. (Senior Processor) got things done quickly and I was able to close and got funded within 30 days!  Super happy with the job that they did.
Robert was always available to answer questions and provided guidance through out the process.
Brieauna was very professional and kept us updated during the process.
Better.com ‘s portal was extremely efficient and easy to navigate to upload required documents.

The loan processing was fully digitized and the interface easy to use. The team was super efficient and provided updates every step of the way. Closed loan in 8 business days and the funds were accessible in 2 business days. I was very pleased with the service.

The team, from the Loan Officer to the Processor, was great. They were timely and knowledgeable. The process went well and closed as expected. The rates and fees were good as well. I will recommend Better to others.
Awesome experience. Very streamlined process and no hidden charges. I will definitely recommend Better mortgage to my friends and family.
very good and efficient customer service.  easy to use Task dashboard.  responsive customer support.

reviewTitle: We needed to take out a Heloc loan to…
reviewDescription: We needed to take out a Heloc loan to remodel our home and we were nervous about the process. Better Mortgage helped us through the process and were quick to fund. Our loan coordinator Chris Kmec was amazing and reached out to us when we had any questions and to update us on the status of the loan. Would definitely recommend Better Mortgage for your loan needs.

Rosa Simmons at Better Mortgage made my loan process incredibly smooth and stress-free. Her professionalism, expertise, and dedication were evident every step of the way. She was always available for me. She answered all my questions promptly and ensured I got the best terms. I highly recommend Rosa to anyone seeking excellent loan services. Thank you for your outstanding support!
Bryan was fantastic!  He communicated the entire way, made me feel comfortable with the docs I needed to submit.  Just an all around easy experience, with a great dude steering the wheel.

reviewTitle: From the beginning of the process…
reviewDescription: From the beginning of the process Jackie was great, and he informed me of the full process. Julie was incredible and kept me informed the entire way.  As for the entire experience and everyone I spoke with,  I would highly recommend Better Mortgage. During my closing, the notary was great and explained everything. Overall the experience was fenominal. Thank you all

Overall very pleased with my experience.  Great communication, prompt responses to my questions, and a transparent list of tasks remaining to close the loan.  Mortgage rate was excellent too. However, my only complaint was that I requested a float down well in advance because rates had dropped but was told suddenly that it was 'too late' in the application process to make any adjustments after they continued processing my loan anyway.  But again the original rate was great.  I would not hesitate to use Better again or recommend them to anyone.
Thank you Jamie and Courtney!

reviewTitle: The whole team was absolutely great and…
reviewDescription: The whole team was absolutely great and easy to work with.
The folks at Better lived up to their name. They were always helpful. They made the process seamless.

reviewTitle: The entire lifecycle of my loan…
reviewDescription: The entire lifecycle of my loan application from start to finish was seamless. Sanam and Sam K were great to work with!

reviewTitle: Quick and Easy Process but be an Informed Consumer
reviewDescription: The staff at all levels were highly professional and knowledgeable about the company's products. The process seemed quick (30-45 days). However, the application seemed to require considerable amount of repetitive data entry on my part as a consumer.

reviewTitle: Casey was perfect in initiating the…
reviewDescription: Casey was perfect in initiating the loan and getting it to the next stage, he was very helpful answering questions and seeking action when I needed help.  Rosa presents as a new employee, not confident in the process and appears to have communication deficits.  There were points where under strict time limitations she did not communicate effectively with the escrow office sending documents to an unverified email address, and instead of communicating with escrow I had to call both sides to get any action.  Documents were sent late, funding was not smooth.  Could have been a lot less stressful experience.

reviewTitle: Great Loan Officer, other parts less so
reviewDescription: Working with Bryan was great, but other parts of the process didn't go as smoothly

reviewTitle: Should avoid, Too many problems, errors to cover
reviewDescription: Literally too many problems, errors to cover. They had all initial docs within 12 hrs of request. Told all looks great. Purchased over 30 properties over the years. Never had a more disorganized, constant changing financial numbers, changing requirements. With only a week or so before closing they required new, completely different documents impossible to attain before closing.

Everything went extremely smooth. They had all the technology that I was able to show my equity in my home and upload all of my home photos to which helped us avoid an appraisal.  The people working on my application, underwriting and closing were extremely responsive and helpful!

reviewTitle: The way in which they were able to…
reviewDescription: The way in which they were able to execute my needs in the timely manner. Thank you for your hard work.

My loan processing coordinator, Sanam Parwani, was extremely helpful and available when I needed help throughout my entire process.

I think Better’s task system can be improved (it gave a few non-actionable feedback when submitting documentation), but the humans in front of the software (including Justin No) made up for the experience

reviewTitle: Switched to Better only two weeks…
reviewDescription: Switched to Better only two weeks before closing and we were able to close on time! Better gave me the best rate of the market. Sanam Parwani with her team did an astonishing job, they were working with me everyday to make sure everything was in place. I’ll definitely work with them in the future!

reviewTitle: Great experience: Second time using Better
reviewDescription: This is my second loan through Better.com. I was fortunate enough to be assigned to Kamaria who was so pleasant to deal with over the phone, but also was incredibly compassionate and understanding. The process of purchasing a home is stressful and I felt like Kamaria really made me confident that everything is in good hands and will be taken care of quickly. She has consistently been super fast and professional. I really have enjoyed working with everyone at Better Mortgage, and Kamaria was just icing on the cake. Thank you to everyone who has been working with me.

Bryan was great, very personable and responsive. 

There was a hiccup with some of my debts not having the correct balances, but he helped me straighten it out in time for my closing.

reviewTitle: This was one of the most simple and…
reviewDescription: This was one of the most simple and straight forward processes. I have ever completed. Every step was easy to understand and implement. The staff were professional and courteous helping throughout the process.

reviewTitle: The best loan experience I’ve ever had…
reviewDescription:
The best loan experience I’ve ever had in my life ! So easy to work with and lightning fast
I would never even think of using anyone else besides better.com.  10,000 star experience…

reviewTitle: Better Mortgage got it done on time!
reviewDescription: I was shopping around and what made a difference in my selection was the communication since the initial contact with Adrian, LO, there was a lot of explanations, follow up and communication. It continued with Michael. I was under a time constraints to get to clear to close and Michael made it happen! I made sure I played my part with anything needed and He was very diligent and we communicated the whole time. Great experience!

reviewTitle: Kasey and Bryan - a formidable team…
reviewDescription: Kasey and Bryan were a formidable team and made the process an easy one.  Simply put, they were the best loan team I have ever worked with.  Amazing!
The process was seamless and user friendly from start to finish. Everyone I engaged with was responsive and informative.
From Day one working with Better was very pleasant. Chris has been very helpful throughout the process and was on top of things and answering all my questions. I was very happy working with him.

reviewTitle: I thought they did a good job of making…
reviewDescription: I thought they did a good job of making the document collection and review process as painless as possible.

I had 2 main representatives who remained constant with communication and updates. Alex and Chantel were a dream to work with. I prefer written exchanges, and they were more than accommodating with emails and texts. When I didn't respond in time, they would follow up with calls. The website is so ideal for managing the loan process. Rates are visible to you with all the possible dollar amounts. I changed the rate that caused my payment to go higher, and Alex called me right away to confirm I meant to do that. Uploading docs was easy and they are reviewed promptly, with notes added for any updates needed. They have tasks that prompt what to work on next, and follow up emails for items not completed. I wish all transactions were streamlined like Better Mortgage.

It was all done via email and over the phone except the closing. I didn't like that when checking the box to have a credit card paid off they would send you a paper check you have to mail in. That would have been a nice thing to know at the time, how it would be paid. I would not have checked the box. I didn't like that I had to pay $550 for an appraisal that I didn't need and it wasn't refunded until a month later and now I have a credit on my credit card account. I paid for the appraisal on May 27th and it was refunded on June 25th.  The timing of these events weren't good and information was lost in translation on these points. I even asked about the appraisal with Tim over the phone and he told me it would be refunded since it wasn't needed. Why it had to wait a month, I don't understand.
Quick quote & informed process, reliable associates, fast closure

reviewTitle: Quick turn around and all digital
reviewDescription: All the requirements are thru website and easy to complete the tasks assigned to me. Also getting personal update from Bryan was very useful.

reviewTitle: I was really impressed with the…Professionalism
reviewDescription: I was really impressed with the professionalism of the Better staff. They kept me up-to-date on the status of my loan and we’re clear about areas that I needed to complete. It was one of the best experiences I’ve had and I’ve done more than a few refinances.
Excellent customer service !

reviewTitle: Becuse of Alexa I experienced minimal anxiety over my loan application.

reviewTitle: Kamaria and the whole team at
reviewDescription:
Kamaria and the whole team at Better has made the refi process so incredibly easy - I can’t say enough good things about her, or about Better. 

This honestly is just a better way to get a mortgage!
Very responsive and communicative !

reviewTitle: Eric Mclaughlin and Kamaria Rucker are rockstars!!
reviewDescription:
Eric Mclaughlin, coordinator Kamaria Rucker and everyone else I worked with at Better Mortgage have been absolutely amazing from start to finish. 

Eric took the time to break down the loan estimate, educated me on how to compare rates and always texted and called back when he said he would. I actually started out using a local mortgage broker who would match Eric’s rate but switched because of the top notch customer service I received by Eric. 

When our inspection report was less than satisfactory and we chose not to go through with the purchase, Kamaria was very helpful and understanding of the situation. She also followed up through text and email and helped me cancel my upcoming appraisal and refund my money. 

I was hesitant to use an online lender but after the experience I received by your Eric, Kamaria and your team, I will be calling Eric when we go under contract on another property. Thank you for actually living up to your name.
Reliable , and strong team behind you to make it happen.

I had great experience with Better Mortgage when I refinance my home mortgage in April. I mostly worked with the loan coordinator Kamaria and she was so knowledgeable and kind. My loan application was a little complicated because it involved my investment property but Kamaria took care of it. I was really impressed. She is by far the best loan coordinator that I have worked with. BTW, I also liked the online based application process offered by Better Mortgage.
Bryan was excellent- upfront, no hidden fees. Highly recommend!

I am am repeat client and will be back again! I absolutely love the portal. Everything is digital but with quick communication from loan consultants when digital path has a hick up. I feel I was very well taken care of by Better. They closed my loan in 18 days!
Very smooth loan process

reviewTitle: Everyone has been great Danielle and…
reviewDescription: Everyone has been great Danielle and Rosa has been great throughout the process

reviewTitle: Better Mortgage - Easy to work with!
reviewDescription:
The app makes it easy to organize and share all the required docs and it is supplemented by a knowledgeable and responsive team of loan experts to answer any questions.  

Easy process!

reviewTitle: Rosa and Elliott were excellent with helping us navigate the process
reviewDescription: As first time homebuyers, we were (initially) very intimidated by the process of underwriting. There are a lot of document and information requests thrown your way, and it can at times feel like you're being perceived as "guilty" and are being challenged by the underwriters to prove your innocence. Rosa Simmons (loan coordinator) and Elliott Reiss (loan consultant) held our hands throughout this process however and made us a lot more comfortable. As we approached closing, we felt like they were on our side and had a genuine interest in getting across the finish line.

My loan team was communicative, flexible and knowledgeable. They explained the process to me thoroughly and gave me options for roadblocks we encountered. I’d definitely use them again if I need to refinance or buy my forever home.
Smooth process
Communication. That is what makes it great! Never had to wait for a response or decisions.
Smooth process, no issues from start to finish.

reviewTitle: The experience from the start was A+
reviewDescription: The experience from the start was very informative and very knowledgeable people in Lisa and Robert.  Vey prompt and technically sound in knowing their job.

reviewTitle: Home Equity line of credit process
reviewDescription: It’s such an easy and seamless process going through better. It’s a great online experience.

reviewTitle: This is my second mortgage with Better
reviewDescription: This is my second mortgage with Better.  They are easy to work with, have competitive rates and very helpful with the process.

reviewTitle: Good experience until the closing day.
reviewDescription: Jamie has been an excellent support throughout the house closing process. The rates at Better.com are more competitive than average market rate. The underwriting process at Better is more thorough than I have ever seen.  That can be good for you but it can also act against you as they go into the tiniest details that won’t really affect your application, which could delay the day you have been dreaming about. Overall, it’s a good experience but be prepared as the underwriting process can be frustrating.

Smooth experience for our first home purchase. Their rates were significantly lower than competitors and their fees were in line with others. The team we had (Drew and Andre) were responsive and knowledgeable and helped us throughout the process. Working with their website was also a better experience than other lender websites, pretty streamlined experience. If you're not comfortable working with the tech and rather do it the old fashioned way, they might not be for you.

reviewTitle: Unreachable when you need the most
reviewDescription: Would have preferred Better.com to be more supportive/ helpful during the final phases on my loan process. Instead, I experienced a non-committal/ indifferent approach.

I used better as my mortgage company for a house purchase that just completed, barely...
Better was absolutely fantastic up until I locked my rate with them.
The second I locked my rate, I could never get anyone on the phone. It went from full availability to work through things to maybe one time slot open a week and a half out
Even when booking those times slots I would get the call from better 20 minutes late!
Better also could not seem to understand due dates, which for a mortgage company is a massive deal. Any time something was due, whether it be a mortgage commitment or even the closing itself, Better showed no sense of urgency. The only way I got any documents from them was cold calling thier public line over and over until someone would finally look into what was going on.
To top it all off, Better almost completely screwed up my closing costing me the house.
Less than 24 hours before hitting the closing table, I called better to make sure everything was still set. Of course, when I get them, my cash to close had gone up 20% from the night before. Less than 24 hours before closing...I spent the better part of that day on the phone and on hold with Better trying to get an answer on why the cash to close went up so steeply, and also why it happened less than 24 hours before closing....
After hours, literally hours, of pain staking calls, being passed from person to person, they finally had their mistake pointed out by my title company (who I would recommend to anyone! Carriage House Title).
Had someone from my title company not taken the time to go through line by line with better, this would never have been caught.

I cannot tell you to stay away enough. This review barely touched the issues I had with better.
The experience was absolutely horrendous.
The incompetence shown by this company is downright astounding.
Learn from my mistake, just go through your local credit union. Better is certainly anything but what they claim to be. They were the worst financial experience I have ever had

reviewTitle: Your on your own after rate lock…
reviewDescription: Better was helpful right up to the rate lock.  After rate lock, very disorganized, lack of customer service, confusing and misleading information provided and overall not a positive experience.

Melanie was responsive, knowledgeable and helpful in getting the loan closed without any hysteria prior to closing.

Jake followed through and made good on the lower rate.  Easy to get in touch with and responsive.
Very easy and fast.
I felt informed along the way and they spent ample time answering my many questions. I never felt rushed or pressured!

Use anyone else. 

Worst experience ever. 

They will constantly jerk you around about what's needed. 

Demand you pay off zero interest loans, Low-ball the estimated cash need to close by thousands of dollars. 

They will give you completely unrealistic pre-approval levels.

For example had a pre-approval for $340,000 loan but when the actual amount was $99,000 it required a bunch of hoops and manipulation to actually get approved. No way would we have ever been approved for $340,000 despite the pre-approval letter.

Put 66% down and it was still a nightmare of not knowing what new hoop they were going to make you jump through at the last minute.

reviewTitle: Minimal closing costs, easy task-oriented interface
reviewDescription: The whole process went very smoothly and closing costs were really reasonable and less than with traditional banks.  Checking the dashboard every day to keep on top of assigned tasks made it easy to ensure all information needed was supplied and didn’t feel like one huge ask all at once.

Started off great.  We were approved then a couple of weeks they called and said they made a mistake in calculation. It was a whole mess and stressful situation trying to get it resolved without losing the house we had a deal on. After that communication was non existent from loan originator.  We had to pay for appraisal upfront to lock in rate. Not a big deal until I saw appraisal fee.  Appraisal itself was standard cost but then they tack on some admin fee which was about the cost of the appraisal!  I questioned it and stated I wanted a refund for admin charge because no one said anything about this fee. I was told they would look into it but never heard back about it. The closing person was better but I had to tell them multiple times about things that should have already been in our file. Not sure I would use them again after this experience.

reviewTitle: It was great to work with Better…
reviewDescription: It was great to work with Better mortgage and Jamie Ohlsen was our loan originator. I felt the process was very transparent and option to look at rates/points and select the best option that works for you using the website adds to the smooth process. I also liked the feature of being able to generate loan estimate in just 1 click on website and ability to do that each time for various rate-points combination allowed me to compare all options in terms of cash to close. Overall the rates and price point was very competitive in the market.
We've used Better for both a refi and a home purchase. Excellent company, very competitive rates, great communication and service throughout. Highly recommend.

Lisa was beyond helpful during my Better experience. She was quick to respond via email and both over the phone. She provided insightful information and answered all of my questions thoroughly and correctly. I would happily use Better again due to my experience with her.

Better Mortgage was fantastic! They exceeded all my expectations. I used Better for a HELOC, and the process was quick and intuitive. There were a lot of documents to upload, sign, and confirm. It very easy to download and upload documents. 

Bryan Unkle and his team were great, and I closed my loan in a little over a week.  Highly recommend Better.com for your mortgage needs!

Awful… Incompetence among the UW, and the team I worked with.

Avoid

Overall experience with Samuel and Stephanie was flawless! They provide top notch professionalism and made the overall mortgage experience a breeze! Better’s automated system is a painless, smooth process. Would easily recommend Better!

Better Mortgage not only offers a streamlined mortgage loan process but also allows you to work with your own realtor and title company. Additionally, they provide insurance coverage through their dedicated team, ensuring a comprehensive solution for all your home buying needs.
The entire process was conducted via the web, with Loan Coordinators providing ample communications and updates, and all under 2 weeks from start to funding of the loan.
the process is very thorough, which means you will need to take time to upload many documents to the Better website and stay in close contact with your Loan Officer.

reviewTitle: This was my third time working with…
reviewDescription: This was my third time working with Better. I came back because their process is always smooth and easy. The dashboard keeps you organized and makes it easy to upload the required documents and information. Always a fast response to any questions or issues that arise. To top it off some of the best rates and no fees!

reviewTitle: Avoid Better.com at all costs, find a local lender or bank to work with.
reviewDescription: Will never use Better again. What an incredibly frustrating process to work with this company. Asked multiple times to have another processor help me, my realtor said the same thing. Still stuck with the same person. I felt like I was teaching a child how to do there job. This was my 5th home purchase. I am a professional financer and worked in the finance industry almost my whole life. What a terrible experience. My realtor and I were joking the whole time if I was even going to close. It was an absolute miracle. I should have trusted my gut and bailed in the beginning. The start of the process was smooth and so easy. After the 3rd day of working it quickly went downhill.

Working with Jamie Ohlsen was an absolute pleasure - again! From the moment we connected, she demonstrated a level of professionalism and expertise that immediately put me at ease. Her knowledge of the lending process was impressive, and she took the time to explain every step along the way, ensuring I felt confident and informed throughout the entire process.

Not only does Jamie Ohlsen possess a deep understanding of the various loan products available, but she also took the time to understand my unique financial situation and goals. This personalized approach was incredibly refreshing and made me feel like more than just another client. 

From application to close, Jamie Ohlsen was proactive in providing updates and addressing any concerns that arose. Her responsiveness and attention to detail were truly commendable. Even after hours on a Friday she continued to work with me to include last-minute changes so that we would meet our accelerated closing date.

Thanks to Jamie Ohlsen's expertise and dedication, I was able to secure a loan that perfectly suited my needs, and she gave us an interest rate which could not be matched by any competing lender – not even close. I cannot recommend Jamie Ohlsen highly enough and will certainly be referring friends and family to her in the future. If you are looking for a loan officer who goes above and beyond for her clients, look no further than Jamie Ohlsen!

reviewTitle: The most streamlined mortgage experience I've ever encountered!
reviewDescription: The platform is extremely user friendly. The fact that everything is broken up into daily tasks, makes the whole process so much less overwhelming. The team at Better was always quick to respond to any questions I had, and were always happy to help. I highly recommend this company for your mortgage and refinance needs. Five stars.

This was the best experience I have ever had refinancing a home. From the first call to completion; I was kept informed of the progress. The costs were "better" than the other companies I considered. The timeline to completion was excellent. The on-line system was easy to use and the required documents were not excessive. My questions were answered promptly. Each person that I talked to treated me as someone that was important to them.

reviewTitle: Honest lender, work like a tech company
reviewDescription: To be honest, I was initially apprehensive with the self-serving model and no salesperson chasing you. However, I had a great experience and my loan agents acted like advisors and keeping me on track with respect to the task outstanding. Lack of communication and understanding what I needed and wanted. Seemed the goal was to get the loan funded as quick as possible instead of how I NEEDED it.

Her responsiveness and proactive communication kept me well-informed at every step of the process. I wholeheartedly recommend Jamie to anyone seeking a reliable and dedicated loan officer. Additionally, Better Mortgage’s automated underwriting process streamlined the experience, making it efficient and hassle-free.

5 stars for working with Jamie, she was our dedicated agent. Jamie was excellent, prompt and very understanding of any issues coming up as we went through this entire process which can be complicated , time consuming and quite daunting. 
I had to drop a star as we had few bumps along our closing process where another agent was working with us. But as Jamie was our dedicated agent, she helped us out here as well and ensured a smooth closing despite few problems along the way.

First of all,  I got the best rate, even lower than minimum rate for 30 year conventional loan.  Everyone at better was really fast to text back, email, and call back when call is requested. Just closed today on a home in Long island.  Thanks
Best Rates…Very easy & transparent process, with Excellent Service.

Quick and easy.  I did everything online, except the loan signing.  Service was prompt, personable, and professional.  It took just 3 weeks for the money to show up on my account.

reviewTitle: Better Mortgage made my American Dream…
reviewDescription: Better Mortgage made my American Dream come true!!! It was quick and easy process going through each anf every step and highly recommended them.
miscommunication

The whole process is online, which is great. The site is super clean and easy to use with a dashboard that outlines outstanding tasks and where you're at in the process. My mortgage rep was very responsive and spent time answering all my questions. Overall a very fast, easy experience.
Turnaround times were quick, and handling tasks electronically was very convenient.  The Better team was helpful throughout the process.

Excellent customer service. Representatives were very responsive and helpful in explaining all the steps involved with the mortgage process.  Best mortgage experience I've had.  Really appreciated being able to monitor the process all the way through.

Terrible experience with this company. Depsite the interface suggesting how easy uploading everything is, at each completed stage, we were asked for something entirely new. Our insurance certificate was wrong even though we confirmed with our rep and had to rebond the policy. Worse, they strung us along until the appraisal phase and brought in a terrible appraiser who knew nothing of the area, and used comps from 10 miles away that bore no resemblance to our house. They missed the additional five acres we own, the radiant heat and heat pumps, the designer appliances and fixtures. All of this ended up with our valuation being nearly 300k less than our last appraisal and totally sunk a month of our time and effort. Would NOT recommend.

Better took 5 weeks to consider my application. They gave me pre approval immediately, and ‘approval’ after 2 weeks. Three weeks later, while submitting final paperwork to initiate my closing, my loan was canceled. They cited a late on my record that was AVAILABLE AND DISCUSSED WITH THEM 3 weeks earlier! They used approval personnel in 3 separate states to assess my file, and apparently one hand was not talking to the other. They then kept my loan OPEN AND APPROVED on their site for another FIVE DAYS, even asking me (after their denial email) for additional paperwork needed for the ‘closing.’ They also changed my home insurance, adding themselves and cancelling off my current lender, and never even bothered to correct the matter days after they denied the loan!! I had to do it. I subsequently got the loan (closed it) I wanted this same week thru a competitor in FIVE DAYS. They still had my loan as open and approved, despite their careless denial email.
DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME. You can find BETTER..I did!
Jaime was awesome! Better was easy, there was great communication, and an easy simple close

Had a great experience with my first every mortgage with Better. Jamie O and Chantel C made the experience streamlined and efficient at every turn. 

Would highly recommend using them for any mortgage needs!

It was already emotional enough trying to deal with moving out of state for employment reasons. When it became a reality that I would need to sell my home and relocate, I had heard nothing but great things about Better Mortgage from friends and colleagues and decided it would be the best option based on the reviews I had personally heard. 

I would like it known that my journey with Better Mortgage has been nothing but rocky and has done nothing but cause more grief and agony for myself during this chaotic time frame. The lack of response I received from my "coordinator" after my loan left the hands of my loan consultant was comical. When I addressed the issue it was received with excuses and the fact that my loan was transferred to her on Presidents Day. Yet other Better Mortgage employees had reached out to me on a Sunday... so would it be wrong to think someone would be there on Presidents Day? 

The final straw was leas than 24hrs before closing when my "coordinator" informed me that after reviewing my 401k statement, there were pages missing and it was imperative that I get the missing pages turned in ASAP. Had this been brought to my attention prior to packing up my entire life into boxes and loading them into a moving truck, I could se this as a reasonable request. The fact that it was asked of me so close to closing AND AFTER I WAS ALREADY ASSURED EVERYTHING WAS IN PLACE, is a complete deal breaker and is where my trust with Better Mortgage has been severed.

Trying to close on one home, while your entire life is in boxes, loaded on trucks, trying to coordinate an out of state move and close on a new house all while trying to ensure that all the i's are dotted and t's are crossed has brought me to my breaking point. I would have expected better from a company that came so highly recommended. 

My "coordinator" assured me the issue was escalated to management, but when I asked to speak with them I was told it would be 24-48 hours for someone to make that call... when I closed in a little over 12 hours be that point.

I was then told that there would be a $1,000 concession "approved by management" due to the error and it was applied almost immediately… but nobody from management could call me for 24-48 hours. 

My closing on this property and the nightmare with Better Mortgage could not have ended soon enough. I want to thank Better Mortgage for the amount of stress and unnecessary worry that they were able to kept me filled with these past few weeks.

reviewTitle: Jamie Ohlsen & her team were great!
reviewDescription:
Jamie Ohlsen & her team were great!
Solid communication & they were even able to accommodate the buyer's request for an expedited close date! Would definitely recommend & welcome the opportunity to work with them again!

reviewTitle: Better Mortgage messed up my 1st loan…
reviewDescription:
Better Mortgage messed up my 1st loan application.  I was preapproved, but then they denied my loan on the last day of the financial contingency. I already had everything ready to go, utilities set up, furniture and appliances scheduled to ship. And I had to cancel all that. They should never had let me go that far and denied my loan at the end.  It let down so many parties.
I asked them how much I could qualify if I could not qualify for the original amount. They had me filled out a 2nd application. On the 2nd application, they verified that I should have qualified for the original loan amount. So I had to go through the process all over again. This time the seller didn't trust me because I canceled the contract on the last day of the financial contingency. I had to put down non-refundable deposit for the seller to sell me the house.  Anyway, they did approve the same loan on my 2nd application. I was able to buy the house eventually.  But due to the mistake they made on my first loan application, I now have a higher interest rate (because mortgage rates have gone up since then), and I spent so much time on canceling all the deliveries and getting refunds on them.
If you want to use Better Mortgage, make sure they fully qualify you very early in the process.
Eric made my experience extremely seamless! Home purchasing wouldn’t have been as easily attainable without him. I recommend everyone to connect with Eric and better.

reviewTitle: Low cost, process efficiency, but terrible at correcting errors
reviewDescription:
Two major pros:
- Significant $avings compared to alternatives
- Online process was *usually* well organized

One significant con:
- When there were relatively minor problems, the process for correcting them was obscure at best. For example, we decided to opt-out of owners' title insurance, but in spite of many reminders, that wasn't corrected until 4 pm on the day before closing. There were at least three other similar disconnects. It seems like in the name of efficiency, Better doesn't empower the point of contact to fix problems directly.

The whole experience, from beginning to end, was quick, efficient and effortless. I had been looking for refinance options for 6 months before working with Better. Each other company was charging exorbitant closing fees, and made the process of submitting documentation miserable. The last one had terrible communication that just felt like I was getting the run around and being taken advantage of. 

Then came Better. From the start, everything was transparent and easy. Took a little over one month to complete my refi from start to finish, and ended up saving a ton of money over the other companies. I would highly recommend anybody interested in a home loan or refi, start with Better and save yourself the time and energy.

Super Simple process 
Saves Thousands in Closing Costs 
$2K Bonus from AMEX didn’t Hurt!
Michael Tadlock and Ravon were Very Professional 
Will use Better Again!!
Steve Miles AZ
Derek and Chantel were amazing. From empathy to full understanding of the entire process, they were able to guide me throughout the journey. Thank you Better.

We financed through Better. Things started off well, but the day before closing they stated we would have an excess of credits. We decided to use that excess to buy down points and we also agreed to remove one of our insurance fees this would have covered it.

On the day of closing the numbers changed and I had to bring more money to the closing table.

It was very difficult to get a hold of anyone who was licensed to speak about rates. When we finally did get someone 2-3 hours before the actual signing there was an oversight on the numbers they provided us. We could not roll things back unless we waited another three business days.

TLDR; In the end we had to buy down points, which we did not want to do. It costs us an optional insurance and bringing additional money to closing. To recoup just the cash portion brought in it would take 2 years. Very bad transaction.

Good rates, low fees. I really like the ability to play with terms/points on my own time rather than in a broker's office. The process is entirely online / remote - which I prefer, but isn't for everybody. 

No issues closing on time. There were a couple minor hiccups along the way that a more high-touch approach might have avoided, but I'll trade a little vigilance for the lower fees any day.
Smooth transaction from beginning.. my loan officer was always on top of communication

reviewTitle: I would not use Better again
reviewDescription: Don’t use Better unless you live in a major metropolitan area and have only basic financials.  The “valuation” company Better contracted sent a real estate agent (not the valuation person) out to take pictures of the house and property.  The company subsequently missed many aspects of the property and under-valued the home resulting in my having to add tens of thousands of dollars to my down payment.  Additionally, Better was requesting very detailed financial questions 1 week before closing, even though they had received all of my tax returns a month earlier.  In the end, any savings Better appeared to have due to a slightly lower interest rate was more than taken up with the need for greater deposit, and the hassle of last-minute questions.  They started out great, and ended up being an absolute nightmare.  Go to a local bank, work with local people…you will be much happier.

reviewTitle: Would recommend Better to all new Buyers
reviewDescription: The folks at Better were responsive, attentive, and extremely patient despite my nervous calls - they picked up and answered me completely every single time. Also they offered the best rates and truly try to get you the best possible terms - not just make a deal. My loan officer Adam, my coordinator Andre, and Robert who set me up initially were amazing. A team that really cares for you to get the best deal made everything so easy. Even now when their job is done they will be with me until I get my keys. Amazing service by all
Great experience in all regards. Brie Williams was extremely responsive in a surprisingly timely fashion, helpful, even in the few rough patches. I'd recommend Better to anyone who asked.

reviewTitle: Terrible customer service I would not recommend to anyone.
reviewDescription: Initial contact with company was good leading me to believe they were a good company to deal with but I was very mistaken. Despite my many emails and phone calls I still dont know if the mortgage application has been submitted because nobody ever gets back to me. I did complain to a manager last week but it seems to have made no difference. I can only assume they dont want to arrange a mortgage for me and go to another broker and write off the time I have wasted sending in documents and trying to get answers.

Overall, I did end up closing with Better, but I felt like my mortgage coordinator and loan officer acted slowly and without transparency. I read negative reviews about Better and ignored them and really wish I hadn't. 

When I asked for reasons why closing took longer than expected or what documents they were waiting on, I was frequently met with shrugs or opaque "we need the documents." I would have closed much faster and with less hassle if I had gone with a credit union and I wish I had shopped around more. I felt like I was in the dark for most of the process, and the staff were unclear about what documents they needed to close.

The only real benefit of Better is that they ordered an appraisal on the early side and they budged a little when I showed them a better rate from UN Federal Credit Union. Lots of other options offer rate comparisons and online options to identify rates so SHOP AROUND EARLY!

Overall, it wasn't a nightmare, but I wouldn't choose them, and would not recommend them to anyone.
Everyone on the team bent over backwards to help us have a great experience and make us feel like we were important customers. I would highly recommend. The process was so easy and stress-free.

Thanks to the Better Team - to John and Elliott, and all of those that support the process to get the work done. Our Processing Expert Ashley Henry was incredibly supportive throughout the entire process and we're particularly grateful to have worked with her.

reviewTitle: Using Better Mortgage for our HELOC was the worst experience - Stay away!!
reviewDescription: Using Better Mortgage for our HELOC was the worst financial decision I've ever made.  I chose them for a number of reasons, including what I perceived to be a fast, efficient online process.  Nothing could be further from the truth.  My HELOC application began February 13th and it FINALLY closed May 3rd.  The over documentation they required (not to mention the duplication) was a nightmare.  There were delays on every turn.  Had TWO major issues with title work, that I had to research and solve myself.  I did research on many HELOCs and almost all had no closing costs if the account remained open for 36 months.  That's what I though was the case here as well.  I was dead wrong and I should have been sure, but I believe Better Mortgage "hid" this in the documentation I was inundated with.  It was a $12,000.00 mistake that they made off of me for an absolute nightmare of a process, where I did most of the leg work.  I was fleeced, no doubt.

Better not only delayed closing twice, and was never timely in anything they did, but they required work building code didn't require - including a basement to have a ceiling - before they'd approve the loan. Included in their nonsense was to have any roofer other than the roofer who recently worked on the roof come out and guarantee the roof won't leak (no one will do that). The roofer who recently worked on the roof wouldn't write such a letter because the provided warranty was already vetted by legal counsel. Better finally accepted the warranty but only if the final invoice showed the account paid. And there is more nonsense this company took issue with that is too numerous to mention here.

reviewTitle: Melanie Intriago was great and really…

Everything was fine until funding.  Poor internal handoffs, missed closing date, no follow up and bad communication.

We’ve already recommended them to others, couldn’t fault them it’s been the most stress free process and we can’t thank them enough for securing our first mortgage for our dream house! Everything was great until it wasn't. The service was 10/10 for the first few days which really sold us and got us to apply for a loan. After the application process, everything immediately changed and took a nose dive. Our "Closing Coordinator" was very uncommunicative and when you could finally reach him, very unpleasant to speak with. As a first time home buyer, we knew nothing about the process - and he had no interest in educating us or ensuring us that everything was going smoothly. For a process that is already very complicated and intimidating, he successfully made it worse.

reviewTitle: Jai was brilliant from the initial…
reviewDescription: Jai was brilliant from the initial conversation all the way to getting us an offer, absolute star who listened to everything I wanted but also gave me his expert opinion which helped me change my mind for the better, and also got us an offer within 2 days I am so impressed, my 5 star is solely based on Jai, cannot wait to use him again !! Can’t forget Ashleigh, our case manager either- she kept us updated at each point of the application; thanks for all the hard work!

Pros/Cons:

I want to preface this with saying I am a manager at a mortgage company and I got in all documents requested within 2 hours of them being needed(This is normally what causes delays in 90% of loans). So I am just being blunt on what I think and my experience.
Pros: the loan officer Christina was great. After the initial loan estimate/conversation her job is not to keep your updated on the process but instead the coordinator. Christina still took the time to respond to me after the fact. The user interface and being able to create your own loan estimate upfront is the best I've seen by far and really let's you know what your options are. Also I was able to get a much better deal than anywhere else even with a broker who I had used before. This leads me to believe Better lost money on this loan and is actually struggling as a company.

Cons: Worst customer service possible after the initial loan estimate/ purchase contract signed. The loan coordinator/processor Cassandra was supposed to take the reins and keep me informed. She didn't reply to my agent or I's emails/calls once the whole process. The only reason I found out they couldn't contact the title company was after I reached out to a customer service rep/called the title company myself. Which I will say this was actually my fault for providing the wrong contact at the company. However why not let me know you cannot contact them after 2-3 weeks? That was hiccup one, but after that it was fine up until closing. I was given a seller credit after the initial closing disclosure went out on 1/31. I asked them to update it 2 times prior to about 2/20 so it would be accurate for closing. Christina would respond but the closing department was doing nothing. The night prior to the day I needed to wire all closing funds I still was not given a number of what was needed until I emailed/texted/messaged a rep/called a rep. I actually had to follow up 4 times that day. It was send out at 9pm after I finally called at 7pm. This is baffling because 1. I asked 2 weeks prior for this. 2. The company makes money when the loan closes so this should of been a top priority. 3. at the company I work at someone would be fired/closed to being fired for such a lack of customer service.

In summary I got a great loan and closed on time but the customer service was absolutely terrible. I do think if you are refinancing with them it most likely is a lot smoother since it takes a seller/agent out of the picture.

Great people to work with.
They were there every step of the way answering all my questions and providing solutions to any hiccup that happened.
The program they have is easy to follow and saved me tons of money.
I will use them again and I will highly recommend them to anyone that needs in need of a home loan.

They would call me back hours after submitted better mortgages loan estimate and tell me they could not beat the price. The experience I had with better mortgage was great. I recommend going with better mortgage after you do the due diligence of comparing rates and estimates. You won't be disappointed or discouraged after you fully commit to better mortgage.

reviewDescription:
Good company. Their staff was nice and mostly knowledgeable. My only issue was that I had to pay $600 for an appraisal just to compare lenders. I went with the other lender and couldn’t figure out how to get my $600 refunded.  A year later I finally filed a complaint with BBB and they quickly issued a refund. Highly unusual that you would need a refund and despite this, I highly recommend using Better.com. 

As an underwriter, I am intricately familiar with the lending process. There were several things I was required to provide that were to check a box rather than a true need. This is where I didn’t feel their staff understood enough of underwriting to be able to leave off the non-essentials that add no value and waste your time. They have a team that makes sure all boxes are checked BEFORE you go to underwriters…and those initial people don’t underwrite, so they have no concept when you try to explain why that particular piece of info is irrelevant and not required by law.  And I confirmed that these items weren’t “required” because the other lender (that ended up closing my loan) never asked for them. 

All in all, the rate I got from Better was umm…slightly better.  I went with the other lender because they seemed more experienced and mostly, he told me I would close 2 weeks early.  In hindsight, I would take the hassle of digging out some extra docs for the lower rate with and straightforwardness of Better.com. The other mortgage broker showed his fee as $1000, gave me several disclosures showing $1000 to him…until the day of closing, then slipped in a new disclosure with a $4250 fee to him.   (This fee from Better would have been $500) So my choice was to cancel closing and lose my house that had a backup offer waiting, or close and pay him his illegal $4250. (They cannot legally increase fees within 5 days of closing).  I closed and paid it. And six months later - before I found time to report him for violating lending laws - the mortgage company realized it and sent me a check for $4250. 

So as a banker, I would recommend Better.com. And will use them if I ever buy another house.  Brokers can be sleazy and I feel that Better.com is a good company that follows the rules that are designed to protect you. They don’t have brokers. You pay them $500 straight up versus a broker getting paid $4250 for collecting your paperwork and emailing it to the lender. And it turns out, my mortgage would have closed on the same date no matter which lender I chose. They all set the date to what the contract said and made zero effort to close before that date. Although one lied and said we would close earlier and Better told the truth.
reviewCompanyResponse: Thank you very much for your review, Tori. Your industry knowledge on this process is extremely valuable and your feedback will be shared with senior leadership. We would truly love an opportunity to work with you in the future and provide you with the high level service you deserve!

reviewTitle: A horrible experience from beginning to…
reviewDescription:
A horrible experience from beginning to end.
I applied for a mortgage with Better and initially found the pre-approval process smooth and the online account dashboard very user-friendly. That's the sum of my positive experience.

I opted to use a recommended Better real estate agent so I could take advantage of some perks they had to offer by using their lending and real estate service in tandem. One problem with this was that neither my home loan representative nor my real estate agent was local to the area. The home loan representative was out of state, and the real estate agent was in downtown Nashville in Davidson County (while we were looking to buy in Sumner County). This made most of the communication happen by email or SMS.

My first home loan representative with Better never communicated with me. I had questions about the approval process, so I emailed him. Then called him and left a voicemail. One week went by without a response, and Better had to assign me another home loan representative.

My Better real estate agent was Tracey Gracey. We toured three homes together with my dad, who was a retired real estate agent. My dad noticed possible issues with the houses that Tracey Gracey did not.

When we decided on a home, since most of my communication with Tracey Gracey was by email, I didn’t fully understand the buying process. She recommended I put up to 5% in earnest money, so I did. But my dad thought it was very risky putting that much up, and after getting a thorough explanation from him, I agreed. I wish Tracey would have been as thorough.

During the inspection, my dad and I were in attendance, but Tracey Gracey was not there until much later. In fact, the seller had to leave her house keys with my dad, the father of the buyer. She eventually showed up the last 20 minutes of the inspection.

The seller’s agent advertised the home as coming with the appliances, but Tracey Gracey did not recommend that the appliances be listed as part of the property in the sale agreement. My dad advised me to get an amended sales agreement detailing every appliance that was to be left with the property. Tracey said that wasn’t necessary, so I had to tell her outright to get the paperwork done and contact the seller’s agent about it.

After a few weeks of house hunting, we signed the sale agreement for a home. When it came time to move from pre-approval to verified approval, Better changed their mind and decided not to give me verified pre-approval for the amount that I was originally pre-approved for. Nothing changed regarding my employment or finances. My 2nd home loan representative with Better said that my wife could not be a co-borrower because she did not have a credit score at all, despite having been pre-approved by the 2nd home loan representative. He advised us to apply again but with myself as the only borrower. When I reapplied, I was assigned yet another home loan representative. This made it my 3rd representative with Better. In the end, I could not get approved for the amount I needed.

I was left with 5 business days to find a lender who would give me verified approval for the amount I needed. And I found that in Rocket Mortgage. Rocket Mortgage had me approved and the underwriting started in less than 24 hours.
By the closing date, I found out that Tracey Gracey had been fired even though I had not yet given any feedback. I am not sure what happened there. My second real estate agent with Better was Taketia Morgan. We met at the property for a final walkthrough, and she asked me if I wanted her to be present for the closing. I thought, “Isn’t it your job to present at the closing?”

So that was my experience with Better. 3 home loan representatives and 2 real estate agents. No one did their job correctly, and they still got paid 3% commission. My dad helped me like a real estate agent, and Rocket Mortgage got my home loan done for the closing.

Lesson learned? Use a local real estate agent and local home lender that everyone knows face-to-face.

reviewDescription:
TL;DR: Better's loan service terms are very favorable to them and other lenders, but not ordinary people. Better misrepresents loan terms when pressed for details. Better is predatory, taking advantage of people's instinct to trust and ignorance of loan terms. Better rushes people to sign a loan agreement when individuals do not fully understand what they are agreeing to. 

Full Review: 

My family and I recently had a rather negative experience with them. The better agent I worked was great about making themselves available during the early part of the process, when there is not much to ask about. However, as we neared closing and needed to review documents, they were hard to get ahold of and were generally unknowledgeable about the terms of the contract. The agent I worked with frequently could not answer questions about the *124 page contract* we were expected to sign (and sent the day of the originally scheduled closing date). At one point, they indicated that since they were going to sell the loan, the original contract did not matter. This is not true. We found that if we had issues with any aspect of the contract, that simply meant we could not sign. There was zero opportunity to negotiate any aspect of the contract, regardless of how small. One of the terms indicated that if we were one day late of making a full payment, we could go into default - meaning the loan servicer could demand we pay the full loan amount at once (an impossible task for most people seeking a loan). So, if for some reason, there was a bank glitch, if I was unexpectedly in the hospital, or if I made a mistake and underpaid by $10, we could lose our home. There was no grace given in the contract. Better indicated over the phone it would take two fully missed payment to trigger that, but when pressed to put that interpretation into writing, they conceded that the original interpretation - one day late of any amount could trigger a default - was correct. 

There were additional loan terms that were likewise very risky to agree to. For example, 'any action' a borrower might be subject to that "in the judgement of the lender"puts the property at risk, you can be put in default. This language gives so much latitude to the lender to simply take your home and very little to the borrower. And they also wanted us to release our taxes so it could be shared and marketed. According to the better agents (who had already demonstrated themselves to be untrustworthy), I could opt out later, but that did not change that I would have to sign a contract agreeing to these terms. 

The better agents were like oil and silk on the phone, kindly trying to persuade me to do things I was not comfortable with, bending the truth, misrepresenting the facts and/or pleading ignorance of both the terms of the contract and U.S. law in order to get me to sign.  Zero out of the 5 stars, would never recommend.

reviewDescription:

The day before closing, I saw that a quitclaim deed had been prepared, rather than a special warranty deed as required by the court order.  Perhaps because it was inconvenient, my request was ignored and later questioned. 

Unfortunately, I had to rescind the mortgage in order to get what I needed.  Things came to a screeching halt. Significant expense was incurred.  This difficulty could have been avoided.

Better Mortgage was the easiest company to work with. Whenever I had a question, I had multiple avenues to reach someone to help me- they will speak to you on the phone, text, email, or even a chat feature on their website. The approval process can seem so overwhelming but Better Mortgage has an impressive online portal that breaks the entire process down into simple tasks.  I can’t imagine an easier set up than what Better Mortgage has worked out.
